channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Stock market volatility hits one-year high, possibly marking bitcoin bottom
item.description: Bitcoin has its own volatility gauge (BVIV), and that spiked in early February, suggesting crypto markets may have already experienced their panic phase.

item.title: Strategy Drops $1.28 Billion on Bitcoin, Issues $377 Million in Preferred Shares
item.description: Michael Saylor declared the start of a “second century,” following the firm’s 100th Bitcoin purchase last month.

item.title: Bitcoin ETF Flows Cool to $619 Million as Oil Prices Spike
item.description: Crypto funds saw $619M weekly inflow as oil spikes triggered late outflows, with experts split on whether Bitcoin can withstand macro pressure.

item.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Rebounds to $69K as Oil Skyrockets, Then Cools
item.description: Bitcoin and other crypto coins are rising as oil's surge cools, Polymarket and Kalshi are reportedly raising at massive valuations, and more.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Bithumb faces possible six-month partial suspension in South Korea
item.description: Crypto exchange Bithumb risks a partial business suspension for negligence around money laundering and customer verification practices, according to local media reports.

item.title: How United Nations Development Programme is using blockchains for public infrastructure
item.description: A new United Nations Development Programme report outlines how blockchain can support public systems.

item.title: Ethereum Rises to $2,000 as Tom Lee's BitMine Tops Up $9 Billion ETH Treasury
item.description: The price of Ethereum is up 4% over the last day, rebounding after a weekend slump under $2,000 as BitMine reveals its latest ETH buy.

item.title: 'Mini crypto winter' nearly over, says Tom Lee as Bitmine ramps up pace of ether acquisition
item.description: The company now holds more than 4.5 million ETH, worth over $9 billion, though it is sitting on a loss of nearly $8 billion.

item.title: Nasdaq Partners With Kraken for Tokenized Stocks, Launching 2027
item.description: The initiative is geared towards modernizing processes including corporate actions, shareholder engagement and proxy voting.

item.title: Bitcoiners celebrate as the network produces its 20 millionth coin
item.description: “A digital money system with transparent, predictable, and ultimately scarce supply... has rising appeal in today’s economy due to fiat currency tail risks," said Grayscale.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 Performance Update: Avalanche (AVAX) Gains 2% as Index Trades Flat
item.description: Internet Computer (ICP), up 1.4% from Friday, was also among the top performers.

item.title: Crypto doesn’t belong in AI portfolio as it’s ‘a different animal,’ says tech investor and former Snap exec
item.description: Former Snap strategy chief and Credit Suisse banker says crypto sits outside his AI thesis.

item.title: Vienna-based Startup Launches AI Pipeline Builder for Gaming Studios
item.description: The platform uses multiple AI agents to generate and optimize game assets as studios increasingly experiment with AI in production.

item.title: Banks will run RWAs on two blockchain rails, says RedStone co-founder
item.description: RedStone co-founder Marcin Kaźmierczak says banks are splitting RWA infrastructure between private networks like Canton and public chains such as Ethereum.

item.title: Strategy buys $1.3B in Bitcoin as holdings top 738,000 BTC
item.description: The purchase brings Strategy’s total Bitcoin reserves to nearly 739,000 BTC despite the asset trading below the company’s average acquisition price.

item.title: KAST raises $80 million at $600 million valuation to expand stablecoin payments platform
item.description: Funding will support product expansion, licensing and compliance as the company scales a platform for cross-border stablecoin payments.

item.title: Bithumb faces proposed 6-month partial ban over South Korea AML breaches
item.description: The suspension, according to local media reports, would only restrict virtual asset transfers for newly registered users, not affecting existing customer operations.

item.title: Stablecoin payments startup Kast raises $80M at $600M valuation: Report
item.description: Stablecoin banking startup Kast secured fresh funding as it looks to expand payment infrastructure across North America, Latin America and the Middle East.

item.title: Nigel Farage invests $286K in UK Bitcoin treasury company Stack BTC
item.description: Nigel Farage has acquired a 6.31% stake in the London-listed Bitcoin treasury company Stack BTC amid broader scrutiny over crypto donations in UK politics.

item.title: U.S. Treasury signals shift on crypto mixers, acknowledges legitimate privacy uses
item.description: A congressional report on implementing the Genius Act acknowledges the existence of lawful uses for blockchain privacy tools even as U.S. regulators pursue enforcement cases tied to illicit finance.

item.title: Michael Saylor's Strategy made $1.3 billion bitcoin purchase last week
item.description: The company now holds 738,731 bitcoin purchased for about $56 billion and worth roughly $50 billion at the current price just shy of $68,000.

item.title: BREAKING: Michael Saylor's Strategy purchased 17,994 Bitcoin for $1.28 BILLION 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBERmhhX2UxVDBhUlBIcHNmNGNjMHFpeVo2aDBmYkFXUnNHeUxjRnc1T3A1ejhZQWZRTTFMZW9yTmNSVzkzbkZqZml0aDJfOEY5dmpjWk5rT1NYLUY0R3BRUnN2dUtFZjQ?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Michael Saylor's …

item.title: Strategy has acquired 17,994 BTC for ~$1.28 billion at ~$70,946 per bitcoin. As of 3/8/2026, we hodl 738,731 $BTC acquired for ~$56.04 billion at ~$75,862 per bitcoin. $MSTR $STRC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBfcjVteGI1OXktczIzb0RwNjNlM21nbWlvRXhZZkg1NXdldHNOT1Z4OEE4ZW9ZVlRCemZ0OFhnSm9ub3pOckVHM0EtS3lsV296V2JOTk9EazdXVHc?oc=5" target="_blank">Strategy has acquired 17,994 BTC for ~$1.28…

item.title: Bybit doubles down on Middle East operations amid regional tensions
item.description: It’s estimated that roughly 1,800 crypto companies operate in the United Arab Emirates, employing more than 8,600 people in various roles.

item.title: Nasdaq partners with Kraken for issuer-centric tokenized equities
item.description: Nasdaq and Kraken will enable tokenized equities to move between regulated and onchain markets while preserving issuer rights and regulatory compliance.

item.title: Bitcoin is beating stocks and gold as the Middle East conflict rattles global markets
item.description: Bitcoin has outperformed precious metals and U.S. equities since the war in Iran first began, softening sentiment after a rough start to the year.

item.title: Bitcoin stays calm while other markets panic: key levels to watch
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 9, 2026

item.title: Bitcoin at $67K despite oil shock is ‘strongest indicator’ bottom may be in
item.description: Bitcoin held strong above $67,000 amid oil surge to $119 per barrel on Middle East conflict and inflation fears, with analysts seeing signs of a potential BTC price reversal.

item.title: Nasdaq and Kraken are teaming up to let you trade tokenized stocks
item.description: Nasdaq plans to work with Kraken to distribute tokenized versions of public stocks globally as the exchange pushes to bring blockchain infrastructure into traditional markets.

item.title: 💥BREAKING: Nasdaq partners with Kraken for tokenized stock trading. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE11dElyTUw4STJER0wyc2hyYm9fcVc1Z1loRzREOU9OTVpUaTQzSUtteHdfN2FRS3ZDVTMxMURwUm03ZHMtRGU1eWVEbGNmREpXUkcweDZPOVNTR2gxemdVOHZB?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: Nasdaq partners with K…

item.title: U.S. inflation, Polkadot upgrade, Solstice-Kamino announcement: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting March 9.

item.title: Coinbase rolls out crypto futures trading in 26 European countries
item.description: Coinbase launched regulated crypto and equity index futures for Advanced users in 26 European countries as ESMA sharpens scrutiny of perpetual-style products.

item.title: Bitcoin rises as oil spikes, equities drop
item.description: Bitcoin climbed during European trading hours even as U.S. equity futures, gold and silver fell, highlighting its relative resilience to oil shocks and war risks.

item.title: Crypto funds gain $619M as markets hold up despite oil and war fears
item.description: Bitcoin ETPs turned green year-to-date with $521 million inflows last week, as total crypto assets rebounded despite geopolitical tensions linked to Iran.

item.title: Bitcoin braces for oil shock and death crosses: 5 things to know this week
item.description: Bitcoin faced two death crosses and the total failure of the $74,000 BTC price breakout headed into the second week of March as the US-Iran conflict raged.

item.title: Oil retreats from 25% surge as G7 weighs emergency reserve release
item.description: Bitcoin rebounded from around $65,725 to nearly $68,000 as oil pulled back from its 25% Sunday spike above $117 and market jitters eased.

item.title: Nigel Farage takes 6% stake in UK bitcoin treasury firm Stack BTC
item.description: Reform UK leader backs London-listed company chaired by former Chancellor Kwasi Kwarteng as it expands bitcoin strategy.

item.title: #Bitcoin is still stuck in the range. That's not bad, that's actually quite strong, given: - Oil up 15% again on this Monday morning, highest level since '22. - Gold and commodities are down - Nasdaq down substantially If US Open turns green and oil starts to corre - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1kb3pLZVhVQ1hIZkJQODdITzlRaFFralJBSXA5SzVtQ0tjazJJNDJUS3VUSk5lUmIzaEJBMHJrT3pSa1dXSFZVU3o4Zm9RWFhsTWdkTDBZb1l6QUhSVVJZSFRDOA?oc=5" target="_blank">#Bitcoin is still stuck in the r…

item.title: Clarity Act will benefit banks more than crypto, former CFTC chair says
item.description: Former CFTC Chair Christopher Giancarlo says banks, more than crypto firms, need the stalled Digital Asset Market Clarity Act.

item.title: Bitflyer volume surges 200% past Binance, Coinbase as oil spike sends Nikkei sliding
item.description: Bitflyer trading spiked even as Japan’s Nikkei tumbled, while Korea and Taiwan equities joined the broader Asian selloff.

item.title: Oil pulls back from 25% spike as G7 discusses emergency reserve release
item.description: Crude oil futures on Hyperliquid dropped from $114 to $102 after reports that G7 finance ministers would discuss a joint release of strategic oil reserves to cool the price surge driven by the Iran conflict.

item.title: Using AI at work is causing ‘brain fry,’ researchers say
item.description: Researchers found that some workers using AI in their roles reported a “mental hangover” with a “fog” that caused difficulty focusing.

item.title: U.S. isn’t really exposed to oil shocks and that might be helping bitcoin stay resilient
item.description: Rising oil prices are shaking global markets, but the U.S. is largely insulated and bitcoin seems to be riding the wave alongside Wall Street.

item.title: Finance job openings fall to 13-year low as US economy loses 92K jobs
item.description: Finance and insurance job listings declined towards the end of 2025, with The Kobeissi Letter arguing the sector should “brace” for job cuts.

item.title: Post-Quantum Shift Could Force Crypto Exchanges to Rethink Wallet Security
item.description: New wallet research aims to preserve a core feature exchanges use to generate deposit addresses without exposing private keys.

item.title: BTC Markets eyes RWA trading license amid global tokenization wave
item.description: The roughly $26 billion in tokenized assets onchain today “is really just the proof of concept,” said BTC Markets CEO Lucas Dobbins.

item.title: Aave Users Reach Record as Traders Quietly Shift Capital Toward DeFi Lending
item.description: With fewer low-risk yield strategies in crypto, investors are turning to DeFi lending, sending Aave usage to record levels.

item.title: Bitcoin could face deeper downside as odds of U.S. market meltdown rise to 35%
item.description: Veteran strategist Ed Yardeni raised his probability of a stock market crash this year as oil tops $100, the dollar posts its best week in a year, and the Iran conflict expands to Saudi Arabia.

item.title: Oil shorts on Hyperliquid get wiped out as crude surges 30% on Iran escalation
item.description: Tokenized crude oil futures saw their largest liquidation event on crypto venues as the conflict expanded to Saudi Arabia and Gulf oil production collapsed.

item.title: Orbital data center company to start mining Bitcoin in space
item.description: Starcloud plans to mine Bitcoin from orbit using ASIC hardware, arguing the economics of space computing favor specialized mining chips over GPUs.

item.title: Flow Foundation seeks court order to block FLOW delisting on Korean exchanges
item.description: Flow Foundation is seeking a Seoul court order to halt planned FLOW delistings on three Korean exchanges following a December exploit that duplicated tokens.

item.title: Treasury Urges Congress to Give Crypto Platforms Power to Freeze Suspicious Funds
item.description: The proposal would give exchanges legal cover to temporarily freeze suspicious crypto while investigators move to secure warrants.

item.title: 🔥 NOW: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong says crypto will "break down barriers around fundraising and capital formation," potentially boosting the number of startups worldwide. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5wMHBoVWxhSDlmeFFxRndpWXVNeTc4cUpKcUdxc1k5bjdQcE9XSUE2Y3dvc3FzSFA0TXRmVEg2VWx2d2F5VHRBOWsyeGRYMmdKRmZsdWswbVlpa0V2bjY3b0lwOWs?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 NOW: Coinbase CEO Brian Arms…

item.title: Bitcoin Price Slips as Oil Surges and US Stock Futures Tumble
item.description: Whether Bitcoin’s resilience holds may depend less on battlefield developments than on how energy prices respond in the days ahead.

item.title: Crypto will break down barriers around fundraising and capital formation next. Reducing friction around fundraising will increase the number of startups in the world, accelerating progress. Every entrepreneur knows how time consuming (and expensive) fundra - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBubDJ0NzlQU3A0UWtOSlRFNExZZVlpS1BWSlp2cEdSM1g3VkdweE5aTFlNeDNIUS1MYjNzdGZJZmNXTFV5WklzVDBXNlQ3bmZlbWJBbG1pZGhscTZJTm5xbk9GcTBTS0U?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto will break down barr…

item.title: 🇺🇸 NEW: The United States Department of the Treasury admits crypto mixers have legitimate privacy uses on public blockchains. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE81RWRpeTg0bUVMNkpBR1RWeTNjZDhKTVE4WXFnMjZZam1aa0pwXzJYakZycGxoVS05TTdmc2RuVVV0QXBaaldGYkdVMWlQa3RGVXlGNXgyNFZDcjFqSWhjaXN3bXE?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 NEW: The United States Dep…

item.title: Crypto Coin Community on X - 79 Members - x.com
item.description: Crypto Coin Community on X - 79 Members…

item.title: 🔥 BIG: US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded their second straight week of net inflows, bringing in about $568M and ending a five-month streak of investor outflows. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1naFFDN1NwaEJUSU9xZE5OQkU5X21nZTZUUk8zbms1S1dCaFdpaDd3SXQ3OGQyOVVNRkpJMkJCcXdoNm4yMExBUGctekRpcllQTVdSWlp2OGxZYjdGQU5UQmRHQ0w?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 BIG: US spot Bitcoin ETFs re…
